# outlook-local-mcp

> A single-binary MCP server that connects Claude Desktop and Claude Code to Microsoft Outlook (Calendar and Mail) via the Microsoft Graph API, with multi-account support and in-server documentation access for LLM self-troubleshooting.

This server embeds its own documentation and exposes it through three verbs on the `system` aggregate tool: `system.list_docs`, `system.search_docs`, and `system.get_docs`. Each embedded document is also available as an MCP resource at `doc://outlook-local-mcp/{slug}`. LLM clients that support `resources/list` and `resources/read` can fetch documents natively; clients that do not can use the `system.*_docs` verbs instead. Call `{tool: "system", args: {operation: "list_docs"}}` to see the available documents, or `{tool: "system", args: {operation: "status"}}` for the server entry point including `docs.base_uri`.

## Docs

- [Quick Start Guide](https://github.com/desek/outlook-local-mcp/blob/main/QUICKSTART.md): Prerequisites, installation, authentication, and first tool call.
- [Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/desek/outlook-local-mcp/blob/main/docs/troubleshooting.md): Auth errors, token refresh, Keychain issues, Graph throttling, mail flags, and account lifecycle.
- [Architecture Reference](https://github.com/desek/outlook-local-mcp/blob/main/docs/reference/architecture.md): Component layout, middleware chain, configuration reference, startup sequence, and known limitations.
- [Auth Flows Reference](https://github.com/desek/outlook-local-mcp/blob/main/docs/reference/auth-flows.md): Device code flow, OAuth scopes, token caching, and Graph client initialization.
- [Changelog](https://github.com/desek/outlook-local-mcp/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Release history and notable changes by version.

## Tools

- [Extension Manifest](https://github.com/desek/outlook-local-mcp/blob/main/extension/manifest.json): MCP tool manifest listing all four aggregate domain tools (calendar, mail, account, system) with their annotations.

## Change Requests

- [Change Request Index](https://github.com/desek/outlook-local-mcp/blob/main/docs/cr/): Architecture and feature change requests for outlook-local-mcp.

## Optional

- [Research Notes](https://github.com/desek/outlook-local-mcp/blob/main/docs/research/): Investigation notes on Graph API quirks, auth flows, and implementation decisions.
